title: Nuclear Winter Zombie Apocalypse
description: ☢️ Harsh Winter Came! Survive Zombie Apocalypse Caused By Nuclear Explosion. Gear Up With Guns And Fight Throught Them | 🌐 Co-op
body: ### 💡 About This modpack was designed to turn you into SURVIVAL MODE! Discover the snowy biomes while looking for a shelter where you can hide. Check your temperature so you dont freeze to DEATH. Make weapons to defend yourself from the zombie hordes... And watch out for bears :) ### ☑️ Features ### ❄️ Withstand The Always Cold And Harsh Weather With Low Visibility ![Player looking into distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22e9fe56fba99f5357cdd7c8a803e1fc1a9c0b58.webp) ### 🌡️ Find Shelter Before You Freeze To Death ![player next to a campfire with a dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d1eb77ef4fc2a20d3ea7a7b6825a35cb6fd6e1e.webp) ### 😈 Zombies Hunt You Down So Prepare For Them ![a horde of zombies attacking base](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d325f86126f423daa411505afd46a94a4455a350.webp) ### 🫀 Every Thing Wants To Kill You, SURVIVE! ![everything wants to kill you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f38cf8d317ab1402d7382b62a80142e715d59e.webp) # ### ⚠️ Can my PC handle this modpack? Yes! We crafted this modpack to be light weight and optimized. To get even more performance you can try these things: - Disable Shaders: Options -> Video Settings -> Oculus -> Shaders: Disabled - Lower Render Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Render distance - Lower Simulation Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Simulation distance - Allocate More Ram: We recommend 4-6gb - Update All your drivers # # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server? Check out Godlike Host! Setting up a server through them is the absolute best way to support us right now. Don't just take our word for it—read the community reviews here: [Best Minecraft Server Hosting.](https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftServer/comments/1i1zl4s/best_minecraft_server_hosting/) 👉 Click the image below or use this link: [Godlike Host](https://affiliate.godlike.host/jessdX) to get 50% off your first month! ### 📒 Credits - Mod used, that adds the Cozy Clothes Etc. -> [Lucky's Wardrobe](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/luckys-wardrobe)
